nasb.text: He made the camels kneel down outside the city by the well of water at evening time, the time when women go out to draw water.

esv.text: And he made the camels kneel down outside the city by the well of water at the time of evening, the time when women go out to draw water.

cnv.text: 黃昏時分，女人出來打水的時候，那僕人就叫駱駝跪在城外的水井旁邊，

ccb.text: 黄昏，妇女们出来打水的时候，他让骆驼跪在城外的井旁，

csbs.text: 到了那地方，他让骆驼跪在城外面的水井旁。那正是傍晚时分，是女人们出来打水的时候。
